pain: LifeRE OS v1 must reach Alpha — a founder-usable daily command center for real estate agents. Stopping on pipeline gates without reaching Point B is failure.
value: Adam opens LifeRE alpha, sees daily command center, top-3 priorities, and nightly debrief draft — without Cursor

ownership: System loops and repairs; Adam owns founder usability verdict at Alpha
